questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if WPF Duratec and Pacific Welding Australia are close competitors, and identify any competitors.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with WPF Duratec and/or Pacific Welding Australia.
